standard.description: Batch standard accuracy — faster turnaround with lower cost
standard.pricingNotes: Speechmatics batch transcription estimates use published per-hour pricing for the selected accuracy tier. Free allowance, volume discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Current Speechmatics docs publish a 1 GB limit for multipart uploads and explicitly suggest fetch-by-URL for larger files. They do not publish a current remote URL size cap or a batch-audio duration cap.

enhanced.description: Batch enhanced accuracy — highest accuracy for file transcription
enhanced.pricingNotes: Speechmatics batch transcription estimates use published per-hour pricing for the selected accuracy tier. Free allowance, volume discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Current Speechmatics docs publish a 1 GB limit for multipart uploads and explicitly suggest fetch-by-URL for larger files. They do not publish a current remote URL size cap or a batch-audio duration cap.
